products.name: KB Masale Red Chilli Powder – 50g
products.description: Our premium 50g Haldi Powder is made from carefully selected, high-quality turmeric roots, finely ground to deliver rich color, strong aroma, and natural flavor. Known for its purity and freshness, this turmeric enhances the taste and appearance of your everyday cooking. A staple in Indian kitchens, it is perfect for curries, vegetables, dals, and marinades. Hygienically processed and packed to retain its natural goodness.

more_details.Key Features:
100% Pure and Natural Turmeric

Rich color and strong aroma

No added colors or preservatives

Finely ground for easy blending

Hygienically packed for freshness
more_details.Storage Tips: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep in an airtight container after opening.

products.name: KB Masale Red Chilli Powder – 500g
products.description: KB Masale Red Chilli Powder is made from carefully selected, sun-dried red chillies, finely ground to deliver vibrant natural color, rich aroma, and perfect spiciness. It enhances the taste and appearance of all your dishes, making them more flavorful and appetizing. Hygienically processed and packed to maintain freshness and purity for a longer duration.

more_details.Key Features:
Made from premium quality red chillies

Bright natural color and rich flavor

Consistent spice level

No added colors or preservatives

Finely ground and hygienically packed
more_details.Storage Tips: Store in a cool and dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep in an airtight container after opening.

products.name: KB Masale Dhaniya Powder (Coriander Powder) 50gm
products.description: KB Masale Dhaniya Powder is made from carefully selected, high-quality coriander seeds, finely ground to deliver fresh aroma and mild, earthy flavor. It enhances the taste of curries, vegetables, and gravies, making your dishes more delicious and aromatic. Hygienically processed and packed to ensure purity and freshness.
